semantic_description: Read-only string scan over a CharArray-backed null-terminated buffer. The function increments i from 0 until it either sees the terminator 0, in which case it returns -1 and must prove no character in the logical prefix l equals c, or sees s[i] == c, in which case it returns the first matching index and must prove all earlier logical characters differ from c. The function preserves the input character array and has an empty-loop/zero-length string edge case.
